purpose: Use AI-generated portraits for a balanced subset of candidates while preserving realistic photo-free CV variation across the remaining profiles. Each portrait candidate also has an explicit fictional appearance contract so the generated image remains aligned with the intended dossier identity.
selection_strategy: Select exactly half of the 30 candidates, cover every profession category, preserve the dataset seniority distribution with 4 junior, 6 mid-level, and 5 senior portrait candidates, and assign one explicit presentation and distinct visual descriptor to every selected candidate.
